case_title: EVELYN BOWENS VS. UCSF SCHOOL OF DENTISTRY- DENTAL CLINIC, et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-24-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BOWENS, EVELYN AS TO DEFENDANT UCSF SCHOOL OF DENTISTRY- DENTAL CLINIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT UCSF SCHOOL OF DENTISTRY- DENTAL CLINIC HERBERT, DR.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED APR-15-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT UCSF SCHOOL OF DENTISTRY- DENTAL CLINIC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOWENS, EVELYN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UCSF SCHOOL OF DENTISTRY- DENTAL CLINIC HERBERT, DR. GONGALES, DAVID *THE EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT THE DEFENDANT'S TREATMENT FELL BELOW THE APPROPRIATE LEVEL OF CARE, AS REQUIRED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
